checks: tests/soak/soak-scenarios.json parses and every scenario has required fields
Godot headless soak_metrics_check unless -SkipGodot is set
expected_final_line: soak_smoke status=ok scenarios=4 live_gated=1 rust_metrics=ok godot_metrics=ok
claim_limit: This smoke validates contracts and metric emitters only. It does not execute a long soak run or close stability, release, live Steam, gameplay, final render, or final ECS claims.
privacy: No secrets, Steam tickets, private account data, provider tokens, raw live provider output, raw unapproved packet dumps, or private machine paths.
